summary.lv: Dyninno (Dynatech) meklē lietojumprogrammu drošības inženieri, kas integrēs drošības rīkus CI/CD plūsmās, veiks draudu modelēšanu un kodu analīzi automatizācijas vidē.
summary.en: Dyninno (Dynatech) is hiring an Application Security Engineer to integrate security tooling (SAST/SCA) into CI/CD pipelines, perform threat modeling and analyse code across a large service ecosystem.
